name: sage-hr
description: Reads Sage HR employees, teams, time off, recruitment, and onboarding/offboarding data, and writes employee/leave/task lifecycle mutations, through the Sage HR API.

risk.read: external Sage HR API read of employee, team, time off, recruitment, and onboarding/offboarding data
risk.write: external Sage HR mutations: employee create/update/termination, custom-field update, time off/KIT-day requests and approvals, leave policy KIT-day configuration, onboarding/offboarding task creation
risk.approval: required for all write actions; terminate_employee is destructive/irreversible
